productName: Micro Bar Disposable Cartridge Pineapple Express - 1g
description: This hybrid disposable carries Pineapple Express in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Simple, smooth, portable, with notes of pineapple, tropical, and citrus, leading into an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
